entities.name: Mount Workspace
entities.description: Mount a dedicated workspace directory into the execution environment.

entities.name: Network Egress (Allowlisted)
entities.description: Outbound network access limited to allowlisted destinations via controlled proxy.

entities.name: Network Egress Denied
entities.description: Outbound network access disabled (default deny).

entities.name: Filesystem Read-Only
entities.description: Execution environment filesystem is read-only except for mounted workspace.

entities.name: Workspace Write
entities.description: Write and modify files only within the mounted workspace boundary.

entities.name: Execute in Container
entities.description: Execute artifact within a container boundary with restricted privileges.

entities.name: Execute in VM
entities.description: Execute artifact within a VM boundary (stronger isolation than containers).

entities.name: No Egress Default Deny
entities.description: Disable all outbound network by default; egress requires explicit allowlist.

entities.name: Read-Only Root Filesystem
entities.description: Root filesystem is read-only; only workspace mount is writable.

entities.name: Workspace Mounts Only
entities.description: Only workspace path may be mounted; all other mounts denied.

entities.name: Strict Resource Limits
entities.description: Enforce CPU, RAM, and time limits on worker execution.

entities.name: Syscall Filtering
entities.description: Apply seccomp/AppArmor profiles to restrict permitted system calls.

entities.name: No Privileged Containers
entities.description: Container execution must not use privileged mode.

entities.name: Secrets Denied by Default
entities.description: No secrets injected into workers unless explicitly granted.

entities.name: Flight Recorder
entities.description: Record all tool calls and file activity for audit purposes.

entities.name: Path Allowlists
entities.description: Deny access to sensitive filesystem paths not in the allowlist.

entities.name: No-Egress Sandbox Profile
entities.description: No-egress sandbox posture: all outbound network disabled, workspace-only writes.

entities.name: VM-Strict Sandbox Profile
entities.description: VM-isolated strict sandbox posture: full VM isolation, no privileged access.

entities.name: Allowlisted Egress Sandbox Profile
entities.description: Sandbox posture allowing egress only to explicitly allowlisted destinations.

entities.name: Workload Identity
entities.description: Assert a cryptographic workload identity bound to the execution context.

entities.name: Read Secrets
entities.description: Read secrets from a secrets vault scoped to the workload identity.

entities.name: Mint Short-Lived Token
entities.description: Mint a short-lived access token (TTL <= 1 hour) scoped to specific resources.

entities.name: Rotate Credentials
entities.description: Rotate a credential (API key, certificate, secret) and update all references.

entities.name: Read Audit Logs
entities.description: Read audit log entries for compliance review and forensic analysis.

entities.name: Write External Side Effect
entities.description: Perform a write to an external system (database, API, filesystem) as a declared side effect.

entities.name: Write Audit Ledger
entities.description: Append an immutable entry to the audit ledger.

entities.name: Publish via Outbox
entities.description: Publish a message via transactional outbox pattern ensuring at-least-once delivery.

entities.name: Inbox Deduplication
entities.description: Deduplicate incoming messages using idempotency keys before processing.

entities.name: Structured Logging
entities.description: All worker output must use structured (JSON) logging with correlation_id and tenant_id.

entities.name: Core Metrics
entities.description: Workers must emit core metrics (latency, error rate, throughput).

entities.name: Distributed Tracing
entities.description: Workers must emit distributed trace spans with correlation_id propagation.

entities.name: Append-Only Audit Log
entities.description: Audit entries must be written to an append-only log; modifications forbidden.

entities.name: Run Metadata Store
entities.description: Store run metadata (inputs, outputs, timing, worker version) per execution.

entities.name: SLO Alerting
entities.description: Alert when SLO thresholds are breached (error budget, latency p99).

entities.name: Flight Recorder Bundle
entities.description: Collect and retain full flight recorder bundle (all events, tool calls, inputs/outputs) for forensic replay.

entities.name: Inspect Dead Letter Queue
entities.description: Read and classify messages in the dead letter queue for triage.

entities.name: Replay DLQ Message
entities.description: Re-enqueue a dead letter message for re-processing with replay controls.

entities.name: Purge Dead Letter Queue
entities.description: Permanently discard messages from the dead letter queue after review.

entities.name: Reconcile Broken State
entities.description: Detect and repair inconsistent state by comparing source-of-truth with derived state.

entities.name: Execute Compensating Transaction
entities.description: Execute a compensating transaction to undo a previously committed action.

entities.name: DLQ Janitor Worker
entities.description: Periodic worker that inspects, classifies, and routes DLQ messages — retry, escalate, or purge.

entities.name: State Reconciler Worker
entities.description: Scans entity state periodically, detects drift from authoritative source, and triggers repair.

entities.name: Max Replay Attempts
entities.description: Policy control: maximum number of times a DLQ message may be replayed before permanent discard.

entities.name: Check Idempotency Key
entities.description: Check whether an idempotency key has been seen and return cached result if present.

entities.name: Register Idempotency Key
entities.description: Register a new idempotency key and bind it to the current execution result.

entities.name: Expire Idempotency Key
entities.description: Force-expire an idempotency key before its TTL for maintenance purposes.

entities.name: Atomic Idempotent Write
entities.description: Write a value atomically using check-and-set semantics tied to an idempotency key.

entities.name: Idempotency Guard Worker
entities.description: Middleware worker that intercepts job submissions, checks/registers idempotency keys, and short-circuits duplicates.

entities.name: Dedup Sweeper Worker
entities.description: Periodic worker that removes expired idempotency keys from the store to control storage growth.

entities.name: Idempotency Key TTL
entities.description: Policy control: time-to-live in seconds for idempotency keys in the dedup store.

entities.name: Track Token Usage
entities.description: Record token consumption per worker call into the billing datastore.

entities.name: Check Cost Budget
entities.description: Check current spend against allocated budget before executing a cost-incurring operation.

entities.name: Enforce Spend Cap
entities.description: Hard-block a worker dispatch when accumulated spend exceeds the configured cap.

entities.name: Estimate Job Cost
entities.description: Produce a pre-execution cost estimate (tokens, compute, storage) for a job.

entities.name: Generate Cost Report
entities.description: Generate a cost usage report for a tenant, project, or time period.

entities.name: Budget Enforcer Worker
entities.description: Policy gate worker that intercepts dispatches and denies jobs when cost budgets would be exceeded.

entities.name: Usage Aggregator Worker
entities.description: Collects token/compute usage events from workers and aggregates into the billing data store.

entities.name: Monthly Token Budget
entities.description: Policy control: maximum token spend per tenant per calendar month before hard cap triggers.

entities.name: Classify Data
entities.description: Classify data by sensitivity label (e.g., public, internal, restricted, top-secret).

entities.name: Route Data by Sensitivity
entities.description: Route data to appropriate storage or processing tier based on sensitivity classification.

entities.name: Delete Data
entities.description: Permanently delete data records in compliance with retention policies (e.g., GDPR right-to-erasure).

entities.name: Redact Data
entities.description: Redact sensitive fields (PII, PCI, PHI) from data artifacts before downstream processing.

entities.name: Consume Stream
entities.description: Consume messages from a streaming topic with configurable delivery semantics (at-least-once, exactly-once).

entities.name: Produce to Stream
entities.description: Publish messages to a streaming topic with idempotency and ordering guarantees.

entities.name: Replay Stream
entities.description: Replay a stream from a specified offset or timestamp for reprocessing or recovery.

entities.name: Rebuild Projection
entities.description: Rebuild a read-model projection by replaying events from source stream.

entities.name: Shift Canary Traffic
entities.description: Shift a percentage of traffic to a new worker version for canary evaluation.

entities.name: Rollback Worker Version
entities.description: Roll back a worker to the previous stable version immediately.

entities.name: Promote Canary to Stable
entities.description: Promote a validated canary version to receive 100% of production traffic.

entities.name: Drain Worker
entities.description: Gracefully drain in-flight work from a worker before shutdown or version change.

entities.name: Toggle Feature Flag
entities.description: Enable or disable a feature flag to control worker behavior without redeployment.

entities.name: Canary Controller Worker
entities.description: Manages canary deployments — traffic splitting, health evaluation, auto-promote or auto-rollback.

entities.name: Rollback Guard Worker
entities.description: Monitors error rates and latency for new worker versions and triggers automatic rollback on threshold breach.

entities.name: Canary Error Rate Threshold
entities.description: Policy control: maximum allowable error rate (%) for a canary before automatic rollback triggers.

entities.name: Ingest Document
entities.description: Ingest a document artifact into the pipeline, validate format, and register provenance.

entities.name: OCR Document
entities.description: Extract text and layout from a document using optical character recognition.

entities.name: Classify Document
entities.description: Classify a document by type, sensitivity, and routing category.

entities.name: Redact Document
entities.description: Apply PII/PHI/PCI redactions to a document using rule or ML-based detection.

entities.name: Stamp Document
entities.description: Apply a visible or invisible processing stamp (watermark, classification label) to a document.

entities.name: Sign Document
entities.description: Apply a cryptographic digital signature to a document artifact using an isolated key.

entities.name: Hash Document Artifact
entities.description: Compute and record the cryptographic hash of a document artifact for integrity verification.

entities.name: Document Pipeline Orchestrator
entities.description: Orchestrate multi-step document pipeline with resumability and audit.

entities.name: OCR Worker
entities.description: Run OCR and return text and layout with confidence metrics.

entities.name: Document Redaction Worker
entities.description: Apply redactions using templates/rules; emit redaction report.

entities.name: Document Signing Worker
entities.description: Apply digital signatures using isolated keys; verify signatures.

entities.name: Untrusted Sandboxed Document Profile
entities.description: Process untrusted/external documents in strict sandboxed environment.

entities.name: High-Risk Signed Document Profile
entities.description: Process high-risk documents with mandatory signing, audit, and isolation.

entities.name: Restricted Redaction Document Profile
entities.description: Process documents with restricted data requiring redaction before sharing.

entities.name: Send Email
entities.description: Send a transactional or notification email via configured email provider.

entities.name: Send SMS
entities.description: Send an SMS notification via configured telephony provider.

entities.name: Send Push Notification
entities.description: Send a push notification to a mobile/web device via push provider.

entities.name: Manage Suppression Lists
entities.description: Add, remove, or query suppression list entries (unsubscribes, bounces, complaints).

entities.name: Notification Delivery Worker
entities.description: Send email/SMS/push with deliverability controls and idempotency.

entities.name: Notification Webhook Ingest Worker
entities.description: Ingest provider webhooks (bounces/complaints), update suppression.

entities.name: Standard Notification Profile
entities.description: Standard notification posture with deliverability logging and suppression checks.

entities.name: Strict Compliance Notification Profile
entities.description: Strict notification posture for regulated channels: audit, suppression, and consent enforcement.

entities.name: SAST Scan
entities.description: Run static application security testing scan on source code or compiled artifacts.

entities.name: Dependency Scan
entities.description: Scan project dependencies for known CVEs and risky licenses.

entities.name: Generate SBOM
entities.description: Generate a Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) in SPDX or CycloneDX format.

entities.name: DAST Scan
entities.description: Run dynamic application security testing against a live endpoint.

entities.name: Verify Artifact Integrity
entities.description: Verify cryptographic digest and/or signature of a build artifact before execution.

entities.name: SAST Scanner Worker
entities.description: Run static code scans; normalize findings; gate build.

entities.name: Dependency Scanner Worker
entities.description: Scan dependencies for CVEs and risky licenses; generate SBOM.

entities.name: Artifact Verifier Worker
entities.description: Verify artifact digests/signatures before execution.

entities.name: CI-Gated Security Profile
entities.description: CI pipeline security posture: SAST, dependency scan, and SBOM on every build.

entities.name: Strict Artifact Security Profile
entities.description: Strict artifact security posture: mandatory signature verification and full audit trail before execution.

entities.name: Inject Latency
entities.description: Inject artificial latency into specified service paths for resilience testing.

entities.name: Inject Errors
entities.description: Inject controlled error responses into service paths for failure mode testing.

entities.name: Disable Dependency
entities.description: Temporarily disable or throttle an upstream dependency to test degraded-mode behavior.

entities.name: Poison Queue Messages
entities.description: Inject malformed or poison-pill messages into a queue to test DLQ and error handling.

entities.name: Chaos Injector Worker
entities.description: Apply controlled fault injection per experiment plans and guardrails.

entities.name: Chaos Observer Worker
entities.description: Collect metrics during experiments; generate reports vs SLO criteria.

entities.name: Canary-Scoped Chaos Profile
entities.description: Chaos experiments scoped strictly to canary traffic with SLO guardrails.

entities.name: Set Job Priority
entities.description: Assign or update the scheduling priority of a job in the dispatch queue.

entities.name: Preempt Job
entities.description: Preempt a lower-priority job to make capacity available for a higher-priority one.

entities.name: Reserve Capacity
entities.description: Reserve compute capacity for a tenant or workload class ahead of scheduled execution.

entities.name: Rate Limit Tenant
entities.description: Apply per-tenant rate limiting to prevent one tenant from starving shared resources.

entities.name: Scheduler Dispatcher Worker
entities.description: Select from priority queues, enforce fairness/QoS, dispatch to pools.

entities.name: Critical Protected Scheduler Profile
entities.description: Protected scheduling posture for critical workloads: reserved capacity, preemption rights, SLO alerting.

entities.name: Evaluate Policy
entities.description: Evaluate an action against loaded policy rules and return allow/deny with rationale.

entities.name: Update Policy
entities.description: Publish a new versioned policy to the policy engine for enforcement.

entities.name: Canary Policy Rollout
entities.description: Activate a new policy version for a canary percentage of traffic before full rollout.

entities.name: Policy Gate Worker
entities.description: Evaluate actions against policy; emit allow/deny decisions and audit trail.

entities.name: Policy Engine Runtime
entities.description: Policy engine must be running and reachable before any guarded action executes.

entities.name: Default Deny
entities.description: Deny any capability not explicitly allowed by policy.

entities.name: Audit Policy Decisions
entities.description: Log every policy allow/deny decision to the append-only audit ledger.

entities.name: Policy Versioning
entities.description: Policies must be versioned artifacts; unversioned policies cannot be enforced.

entities.name: Strict Default Deny Policy Profile
entities.description: Strict policy posture: default-deny everything, versioned policies, full audit trail.

entities.name: Sign Artifact
entities.description: Apply a cryptographic signature to a build or data artifact using a managed key.

entities.name: Verify Signature
entities.description: Verify the cryptographic signature of an artifact against known public keys.

entities.name: Issue Attestation
entities.description: Issue a signed attestation statement (e.g., SLSA provenance, SBOM attestation).

entities.name: Verify Attestation
entities.description: Verify a signed attestation statement before trusting an artifact.

entities.name: Generate Provenance Chain
entities.description: Assemble complete provenance chain: source → build → scan → SBOM → signatures.

entities.name: Provenance Signer Worker
entities.description: Sign build artifacts; emit signature and provenance metadata.

entities.name: Provenance Verifier Worker
entities.description: Verify signatures and attestations; enforce fail-closed semantics.

entities.name: Provenance Assembler Worker
entities.description: Assemble provenance chain (source, build, scan, SBOM, signatures).

entities.name: Production Strict Provenance Profile
entities.description: Strict production provenance posture: mandatory signing, attestation, and full provenance chain.

entities.name: Approve Change
entities.description: Collect and record a human approval decision for a proposed change or action.

entities.name: Break Glass
entities.description: Invoke emergency break-glass access with mandatory audit logging and time-limited elevation.

entities.name: Execute Runbook
entities.description: Execute a named operational runbook with step-level audit and rollback checkpoints.

entities.name: Generate Postmortem
entities.description: Generate a structured postmortem report from incident timeline and evidence.

entities.name: On-Call Supervisor Worker
entities.description: Coordinate incident response; enforce kill switches and runbooks.

entities.name: Approval Coordinator Worker
entities.description: Route approval requests; enforce two-person rule; track decisions.

entities.name: Incident Mode Ops Profile
entities.description: Incident response posture: flight recorder, kill switches, runbook execution, break-glass controls.

entities.name: Strict Approval Ops Profile
entities.description: Strict change control posture: mandatory human approval, two-person rule, full audit trail.

entities.name: Accept External Identity
entities.description: Accept and validate an identity token from a trusted external organization.

entities.name: Exchange Federation Tokens
entities.description: Exchange a partner token for a scoped local token via federation handshake.

entities.name: Enforce Data Contract
entities.description: Validate inbound/outbound data against the partner data contract before processing.

entities.name: Isolate Guest Workers
entities.description: Run partner/guest workers in isolated execution pools with default-deny capabilities.

entities.name: Federation Gateway Worker
entities.description: Front-door for partner integrations; validate identity; issue scoped tokens.

entities.name: Guest Pool Worker
entities.description: Execute partner workloads in isolated pools with default-deny capabilities.

entities.name: Strict Partner Federation Profile
entities.description: Strict federation posture: validated identity, scoped tokens, data contract enforcement, full audit.

entities.name: Guest Isolated Federation Profile
entities.description: Guest workload isolation posture: sandboxed execution, no egress, workspace-only access.

entities.name: Run Model Eval
entities.description: Execute an evaluation suite against a model, prompt, or tool version and publish scores.

entities.name: Update Prompt Templates
entities.description: Update versioned prompt templates after safety eval and approval gate.

entities.name: Update Tool Definitions
entities.description: Update versioned tool definitions (function specs, schemas) after QA gate.

entities.name: Detect Model Drift
entities.description: Detect statistical drift in model output quality, safety, or cost over time.

entities.name: Prompt Injection Test
entities.description: Run prompt injection attack vectors against a model to validate safety guardrails.

entities.name: Model Eval Runner Worker
entities.description: Run eval suites against model/prompt/tool versions; publish scores.

entities.name: Model Drift Monitor Worker
entities.description: Monitor production for drift in quality/safety/cost; trigger alerts.

entities.name: Prompt QA Gate Worker
entities.description: Gate prompt/tool changes via safety evals, approvals, and canary rollout.

entities.name: Release-Gated Model Profile
entities.description: Release gate posture: mandatory eval, safety tests, and approval before model/prompt/tool promotion.

entities.name: Strict Drift Monitoring Model Profile
entities.description: Strict drift monitoring posture: continuous SLO-based alerting and automated remediation triggers.

entities.name: Write Memory
entities.description: Store a memory artifact (embedding, document, structured record) under a scoped key.

entities.name: Read Memory
entities.description: Retrieve a memory artifact by key or query within scope and access controls.

entities.name: Delete Memory
entities.description: Delete one or more memory artifacts; emit deletion audit record.

entities.name: Embed Text
entities.description: Convert text to a vector embedding using a configured embedding model.

entities.name: Summarize Context
entities.description: Summarize a long context window to a bounded token representation preserving provenance.

entities.name: RAG Retrieval
entities.description: Retrieve relevant memory chunks via hybrid vector + keyword search for RAG pipelines.

entities.name: Memory Retriever Worker
entities.description: Retrieve memory/document chunks under scope filters and token budgets.

entities.name: Memory Curator Worker
entities.description: Decide what gets stored; apply redaction, TTL, provenance; prevent poisoning.

entities.name: Memory Summarizer Worker
entities.description: Summarize long context to bounded tokens preserving provenance.

entities.name: Strict Scoped RAG Profile
entities.description: Strict RAG posture: scoped retrieval, token budget enforcement, no cross-tenant leakage.

entities.name: Privacy-Conservative Memory Profile
entities.description: Privacy-conservative memory posture: minimal retention, aggressive TTLs, deletion audit.

entities.name: Budgeted Summaries Memory Profile
entities.description: Cost-conscious memory posture: summarization-first, token budget enforcement.

entities.name: Define Workflow DAG
entities.description: Define a directed acyclic graph of workflow steps with dependencies and data flows.

entities.name: Checkpoint Workflow
entities.description: Persist workflow execution state at a checkpoint for durable resumption.

entities.name: Compensate Workflow
entities.description: Execute compensation steps to undo committed actions in a failed saga.

entities.name: Replay Deterministic Workflow
entities.description: Replay a workflow from a checkpoint with deterministic step execution for recovery.

entities.name: Fan-Out / Fan-In
entities.description: Parallelize workflow steps across multiple workers and aggregate results.

entities.name: Workflow Orchestrator Worker
entities.description: Execute durable workflows: schedule steps, checkpoint, retry, compensate.

entities.name: Workflow Step Executor Worker
entities.description: Execute a single workflow step under idempotency keys.

entities.name: Durable Saga Workflow Profile
entities.description: Durable saga posture: checkpoints, compensations, exactly-once semantics, distributed tracing.

entities.name: Database Read
entities.description: Read data from a database within scope and tenant isolation boundaries.

entities.name: Database Write
entities.description: Write or update data in a database with transaction and audit guarantees.

entities.name: Database Migration
entities.description: Apply a versioned schema migration with dry-run, canary, and rollback support.

entities.name: Database Backfill
entities.description: Backfill existing records with new computed fields using throttled, resumable batch processing.

entities.name: Database Reconcile
entities.description: Compare source-of-truth against derived projections and repair inconsistencies.

entities.name: Database Migration Worker
entities.description: Schema migrations/backfills with canary, throttling, and checkpoints.

entities.name: Database Reconciler Worker
entities.description: Compare source-of-truth vs derived projections; repair drift with audit.

entities.name: Safe DB Migration Profile
entities.description: Safe migration posture: dry-run first, canary rollout, full audit, rollback checkpoint.

entities.name: Strict Reconciliation DB Profile
entities.description: Strict reconciliation posture: continuous drift detection, repair-on-detect, full audit.

entities.name: Verify Inbound Webhook
entities.description: Verify the signature and authenticity of an inbound webhook before processing.

entities.name: Call External API
entities.description: Call a third-party API with backoff, circuit breakers, and rate limiting.

entities.name: Validate Data Contract
entities.description: Validate a data payload against a versioned data contract schema.

entities.name: Replay Webhook
entities.description: Replay a previously received webhook event for recovery or re-processing.

entities.name: Rotate Integration Credentials
entities.description: Rotate API keys, OAuth tokens, or other credentials for a third-party integration.

entities.name: Webhook Ingest Worker
entities.description: Ingest external webhooks; verify signatures; validate contracts; enqueue.

entities.name: API Adapter Worker
entities.description: Call external APIs with backoff, circuit breakers, rate limits, and idempotency.

entities.name: Strict Webhook Integration Profile
entities.description: Strict webhook posture: signature verification, contract validation, replay idempotency.

entities.name: Resilient Adapter Integration Profile
entities.description: Resilient API adapter posture: circuit breakers, backoff, rate limits, metrics.

entities.name: Route to Review Queue
entities.description: Route a task or decision to a human review queue with explainability bundles.

entities.name: Collect Form Input
entities.description: Present a structured form to a human user and collect validated input.

entities.name: Show Diff for Review
entities.description: Display a structured diff of proposed changes to a human reviewer.

entities.name: Capture Human Feedback
entities.description: Collect structured feedback (thumbs, ratings, corrections) from a human user.

entities.name: Escalate to Human
entities.description: Interrupt automated processing and escalate to a human operator with full context.

entities.name: Review Router Worker
entities.description: Route tasks to review queues with explainability bundles and SLAs.

entities.name: Feedback Collector Worker
entities.description: Collect structured human feedback tied to outcomes.

entities.name: Strict Review Queue UI Profile
entities.description: Strict review queue posture: mandatory human review for all high-stakes decisions, SLA tracking.

entities.name: Edge Local Store
entities.description: Write data to local edge storage with TTL, size limits, and sync markers.

entities.name: Edge Sync
entities.description: Sync local edge events and artifacts to cloud with conflict resolution.

entities.name: Device Attestation
entities.description: Attest the integrity and identity of an edge device using TPM or hardware root of trust.

entities.name: Update Edge Agent
entities.description: Apply a signed software update to an edge agent in a ring-based rollout.

entities.name: Edge Local Inference
entities.description: Run ML inference locally on the edge device without cloud connectivity.

entities.name: Edge Sync Agent Worker
entities.description: Sync local events/artifacts to cloud with conflict resolution and bandwidth budgets.

entities.name: Edge Update Manager Worker
entities.description: Apply signed updates in rings; verify integrity; rollback on failures.

entities.name: Edge Local Inference Worker
entities.description: Run local inference under constrained compute with strict sandboxing.

entities.name: Strict Offline Edge Profile
entities.description: Strict offline-capable edge posture: local store, device attestation, no cloud dependency.

entities.name: Ring-Based Update Edge Profile
entities.description: Ring-based update posture: signed updates, ring rollout, integrity verification, audit trail.

entities.name: Register Worker
entities.description: Enroll a worker into the workforce registry with validated controls and provenance.

entities.name: Route Task
entities.description: Route a task to the appropriate worker using deterministic routing rules.

entities.name: Compose Workflow
entities.description: Compose multi-worker workflows with policy gates, cost controls, and provenance.

entities.name: Enforce Policies
entities.description: Enforce workforce-wide policies (budget, data label, QoS, privileges) at every routing step.

entities.name: Observe End-to-End
entities.description: Collect end-to-end telemetry with correlation_id across all workers in a request.

entities.name: Emergency Controls
entities.description: Activate global or per-worker kill switches for emergency shutdown or quarantine.

entities.name: Govern Worker Lifecycle
entities.description: Manage worker enrollment, suspension, retirement, and version transitions.

entities.name: Memory and Context Service
entities.description: Provide memory and context services to workers (scoped retrieval, embedding, summarization).

entities.name: Workforce Router Worker
entities.description: Route, compose, and govern across all workers; enforce policies, budgets, QoS, and provenance.

entities.name: Registry Manager Worker
entities.description: Maintain worker registry; enroll/retire; validate controls and provenance.

entities.name: Incident Commander Worker
entities.description: Coordinate incident mode: kill switches, quarantine, runbooks, evidence bundles.

entities.name: Worker Registry
entities.description: Maintain an enrolled worker registry; deny execution for unregistered workers.

entities.name: Deterministic Routing Rules
entities.description: Enforce deterministic, versioned routing rules (first-match-wins).

entities.name: Policy Gate Every Step
entities.description: Apply policy gate at every routing step, not just pre-run.

entities.name: End-to-End Correlation
entities.description: Propagate correlation_id across every worker call, tool call, and telemetry event.

entities.name: Global Kill Switches
entities.description: Global and per-worker kill switches for emergency shutdown.

entities.name: Budget and Cost Enforcement
entities.description: Enforce per-agent, per-tenant cost caps and budgets.

entities.name: Provenance Requirements
entities.description: Require signed provenance for all production worker executions.

entities.name: Production Control Plane Profile
entities.description: Production workforce OS posture: registry, routing, policy gates, cost enforcement, provenance.

entities.name: OS Incident Mode Profile
entities.description: Incident mode workforce OS posture: kill switches active, forensic logging, restricted routing.

entities.name: Blast Radius Scoring
entities.description: Compute blast score (0-100) from env, data_label, QoS, and request hints; gate actions with score >= 85 in prod.

entities.name: Privilege Envelopes Required
entities.description: Workers must declare a privilege envelope (secrets, egress, writes, tools) before execution.

entities.name: Egress Allowlist Policy
entities.description: In prod/edge with RESTRICTED data, any egress destinations must be explicitly allowlisted.

entities.name: Replay Safety Policy
entities.description: Nondeterministic workers require checkpoints and approvals before replay.

entities.name: Sandbox Default Deny Policy
entities.description: All workers must operate in sandbox default-deny posture unless explicitly exempted.

entities.name: Policy Default Deny
entities.description: Policy engine must default-deny all capability requests not covered by explicit policy.
